title: hieracium murorum subsp. proversum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. proversum, also known as Hawkweed or Mouse-eared Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. proversum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
